message:
refactor: Consolidate fnv_hash and utils to single source

- Remove packages/tokenizer/src/fnv_hash.zig, import from src/utils/
- Remove packages/runtime/src/Lib/utils_impl/ (5 files), use src/utils/
- Update json_impl/arena.zig and parse_arena.zig to use module imports
- Update all tokenizer files to use utils.fnv_hash module import
- Add fnv_hash and allocator_helper imports to build.zig modules

Eliminates 6 duplicate utility files (~400 lines) by importing from
the canonical src/utils/ location.
